mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM interview_answers a JOIN interview_sessions s ON s.id = a.session_id WHERE s.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY a.question_index ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_answers ( session_id, question_index, question, category, user_answer, score, feedback, reference_answer, key_points_json, answered_at ) VALUES ( #{entity.session.id}, #{entity.questionIndex}, #{entity.question}, #{entity.category}, #{entity.userAnswer}, #{entity.score}, #{entity.feedback}, #{entity.referenceAnswer}, #{entity.keyPointsJson}, COALESCE(#{entity.answeredAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_answers SET session_id = #{entity.session.id}, question_index = #{entity.questionIndex}, question = #{entity.question}, category = #{entity.category}, user_answer = #{entity.userAnswer}, score = #{entity.score}, feedback = #{entity.feedback}, reference_answer = #{entity.referenceAnswer}, key_points_json = #{entity.keyPointsJson}, answered_at = #{entity.answeredAt} WHERE id = #{entity.id}
